name: The Iron Price
description: Captain Draven of the Ironmarch Legion has given Ashvale seven days to accept the Legion's protection — or face the consequences. The clock is ticking.

DISCOVERED.journal_entry: A rider warned that the Ironmarch Legion is coming. The village is in a panic. I should prepare for their arrival.

ACTIVE.journal_entry: Captain Draven has arrived in Ashvale. He speaks of protection, but his eyes say conquest. Seven days to decide the village's fate.
objectives: Speak with Captain Draven at the inn
Decide Ashvale's response before the deadline (Day 7)

SUBMITTED.journal_entry: I accepted the Legion's terms. Ashvale will fly the Ironmarch banner. The people are safe — but they are no longer free. Lord Ashworth has been stripped of power. Draven smiles like a man who's won a game he's played a thousand times.

DEFIED.journal_entry: I refused the Legion's terms. Draven left with cold promises of what comes next. War is coming to Ashvale — and we may not survive it. But at least we chose to fight.

NEGOTIATED.journal_entry: I brokered a deal: Ashvale pays tribute and grants trade access, but keeps its lord and laws. Draven accepted — barely. It's a leash, not a collar. But leashes can be slipped.

ELIMINATED.journal_entry: Captain Draven is dead. The Legion will send more — and they will not send a diplomat next time. I've bought Ashvale weeks, maybe months. But the price will be paid in blood.

ALLIED_WITH_LEGION.journal_entry: I offered Draven something better than Ashvale's submission — I offered him an insider. In exchange for power and position in the new order, I will deliver the village from within. The people who trusted me will never see it coming.
